Exit status of command 'flutter pub get' was 1 instead of 0. Resolving dependencies in `C:\dev\flutter\unit_converter`... Because every version of common_flutter_ads from path depends on intl ^0.19.0 and unit_converter depends on intl ^0.20.2, common_flutter_ads from path is forbidden. So, because unit_converter depends on common_flutter_ads from path, version solving failed.
You can try the following suggestion to make the pubspec resolve: * Consider downgrading your constraint on intl: flutter pub add intl:^0.19.0 Failed to update packages.
